titleStmt.title: SII 41.28: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 28. (A.R. No. 27 of 1905.) Tiruppālappandal, Tirukkoyilur Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: South wall of the first prākāra of the Madhyasthānēśvara temple.

p.hi: Vijayanagara, Harihara II Śaka 1300 Kālayukti, Karkaṭaka śu. 13, Thursday, Mūla = 1378, July 8.

summary.p: This records the sale-deed of land called puḷiyāṇḍai tiurthai (boundaries specified) for 100 Virachampan kuḷigai, by the authorities of the temple of Tirunāgiśvaramuḍaiya nāyaṉār at Tiruppālaippandal, in Kīḻ[ko]ṇḍa nāḍu of Vānagōppāḍi, on the southern bank of Peṇṇai, to Tiruvambalapperumāl, a madhyastha of Vaḍapēṟu, a southern hamlet of Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a division of Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu. The land is stated to have been formerly purchased from Kulaśēkharadēva alias Māḷuva-chakravarti.

There are two endorsemnts dated in the cyclic Years Yuva, Mārgaḻi 5 and Pramādi, Pūraṭṭādi 15, recording further transactions pertaining to this land made by Cheyya Tirumēni of Vaḍapēṟai, son (?) of Tiruvambala-pperumāl of Vaḍapēṟu and in this connection the sum of 80 vīrachampan kuḻigai is mentioned. The dates mentioned above correrspond respectively to 1395 A.D., December 2 and 1399 A.D., September 13.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakābdam 1000 3 100mel Ariyappa Uṭaiyāṟku cellā niṉṟa kālayukti varuṣattu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟupūrvvapakṣa
ttutrayodaśiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mulattunāḷ peṇṇait teṉkarai vāṇakoppāṭik kiḻkoṇṭa nāṭṭu
tiruppālaippantal nāyaṉār tirunākiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil Āticaṇṭeśvara nāyaṉār tiruvāy malarntaruḷinapaṭi
kku rudrar śrīmāheśvararum devakarmmikaḷ koyil kaṇakkarum Irācarāca vaḷanāṭṭu rācarācaccaturvvedimaṅkalattu teṉpi
ṭākayil vaṭapaṟṟil madhyastan vaṭapeṟuṭaiyāṉ tiruvampalapperumāḷukku caṇḍeśvarap peruvilaiyāka vilai niścayi
ttuk kuṭuppatāṉa nilattukku Ellaiyāvatu Ivūr vārappaṟṟukku vaṭakkut tām muṉṉāḷ kulacekaratevarāṉa māḷuvaccakkaravatti
pakkal koṇṭuṭaiya puḷiyāṇṭai tiruttai cūḻnta nilattukku Ellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai muṭiyaṉūr Ellaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai
Uṭaiyār Ental kaḻaṉikku vaṭakkum pokiṟa Ōṭai Uṭpaṭa vaṭakkum Itaṉmeṟku teṉpāṟkelai vārap paṟṟukku Oṭaiyuṭpaṭa vaṭakkum Itaṉ me
ṟku teṉpāṟkellai paṭṭukkaṭṭi Ental kaḻaṉikku vaṭakku Oṭaiyuṭpaṭavum Itaṉmeṟku paṭṭukkaṭṭi Ental vaṭakoṭiyil pāṟaikku vaṭakku Itaṉmeṟku
Intap pāṟaic cevvaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkkellaik kuṭiyellaiyāṉa paccāṟuṭaiyāṉ Ental kaḻaṉikku kiḻakkum Itaṉ vaṭapāṟkellait taṭi
yellaikku teṟkum Itaṉ kiḻakku muṭiyaṉūrellaikkut teṟkumi ṉāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nilattukkuḷḷut taṭikkeṟa nirukku Eruvaiyāṉa nila
ttile tammuṭaiya perāle Entalum veṭṭi pereri nirukku Eruvaiyāṉa Iṭaṅkaḷile vāykkālum veṭṭi koṇṭu kā
ṭu veṭṭi karampu tirutti kiṇaṟum veṭṭi meṭupaḷḷamum Okka Accukkaṭṭākki candrātittavaraiyum mukkāl varicaiyum kālvaḻik kāṇippaṟṟāka Aṉupavit
tup pota Iṉṉilattukku caṇḍevarap peruvilaiyāka niccayitta Aṉṟāṭu naṭakkum viracampaṉ kuḷikai Orumā100ipaṇam nūṟum peṇṇorupāka taṭṭāṉ
pārvaiyāka Orukuḻippāṭip paṟṟikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiṟamāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ivaṟku Inta Ellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilam viṟṟu Oṟṟip piratikiṟa
yaṅkaḷukkum sakala prāptikaḷukkum tamakkum tammuṭaiya vaṟkattāṟkum candrātitittavaraiyuñ cella naṭattuk koḷḷavum Ippaṭikku Ivai Immaṇṭa
lattu tavaṇaikkuk kaṭava marutattūruṭaiyāṉ peṇṇorupākaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ṉāṭṭuṭaiyār Eḻuttu Ivai Ālālacuntaranampi Eḻuttu (ivai)
Ivai nittakaliyāṇanampi Eḻuttu Ivai pariyeṟuvār Eḻuttu Ivai koyil kaṇakku Akkaḻimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu§

svastiśrī .This inscription is engraved in continuation of No, 27.yuva varuṣammārkaḻi mātam 5§ muṭiyaṉūr mutaliyār nāyiṉār muṭiyaṉūr piḷḷaikku vaṭapeṟai Uṭaiyāṉ ceyya tirumeṉi Aiyyar m tiru
kalveṭṭupaṭikku tiruviṭṭukRead tirivikuṭuttapaṭi Eṅkaḷ pitākkaḷ koṇṭuṭaiya Eṉ puḷiyāṇṭai tiruttu mukkāl varicaik
viracampaṉ kuḷikai paṇam8 10ippaṇam Eṇpatum Ivvūrp peṇṇorupākat taṭṭāṉ pārvaiyāka Oru kuḻippaṭippaṟṟik koṇṭu
Iṭa Ivai ceyya tirumeṉi Eḻuttu Ivai ceyyān Attattār Eḻuttu Ivai tiruvayya
Ippaṭi periyanāṭṭu nampiyaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ nittakalyāṇanampiyeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ūrpākaṅ koṇṭā neṉ Ip
mumaṭi ku ney perumāḷeṉ§pramāti varuṣam puraṭṭāti mātam 10 5§ tiruppālappantal Uṭaiyār tirunākiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār
nāṉ yāṉ Ivvūril puḷiyāṇṭaitiruttuIncomplete
Digital edition of SII 41.28 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
